_comment: Friendly product name + colour lookup. The marketing model/colour are NOT broadcast over BLE, so they are resolved here. Preferred key: the bike's article code (SKU, e.g. BUA0652) — but the bike only pushes that during the app's full settings-sync, which the add-on does not replicate. Reliable fallback: the FRAME number (read from eb41 every time) — add your bike under 'frames' with name/color/sku. Find both in the panel (Technical info). Contribute via a GitHub issue/PR.
